name: Kenneth Rocafort
visual_principles: High-detail surfaces can still read clearly if the silhouette is strong.
Costume design can merge fashion, armor, and technology.
Mechanical detail should support motion and identity, not become noise.
color_language: Study contrast between armor panels, undersuits, glowing tech accents, and character identity colors.
storytelling_methods: Clothing and armor communicate role, power level, movement style, and future technology.

ai_role_relevance.minerva: Study shape language, visual hierarchy, and how layered detail supports identity.
ai_role_relevance.ajani: Use principles for leadership uniforms, tactical clothing, armor, gloves, boots, and personal style.
ai_role_relevance.hermes: Use principles for robot shells, exosuit armor, mechanical panel layering, and functional tech aesthetics.
